overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a sunlit urban street lined with palm trees, transitioning from a residential area to a commercial district with distant futuristic skyscrapers visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential sidewalk with utility poles and wooden houses

events.description: character approaches intersection and prepares to turn right

agents.ego_description: character in red jacket and pants walking steadily along the sidewalk past wooden houses and utility poles

entered.detail: single-story wooden residential building with porch
large green metal dumpster on the sidewalk
tall metal electrical transmission tower with multiple cables
tall palm trees lining the right side of the street
scattered cardboard debris on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunlit residential sidewalk bordered by a wooden house on the left and palm trees on the right. A green dumpster and scattered cardboard boxes litter the path ahead, while power lines stretch toward the distant city skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with vehicle traffic and mixed architecture

events.description: blue van drives past on the street from left to right
red car passes by on the road heading in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: character turns at the intersection and crosses the street, navigating between passing vehicles

notable_agents.action: blue van driving along the street from left to right

entered.detail: small building with distinctive red tiled roof
low-rise building with solar panels installed on the roof
multi-lane asphalt street with red curbs

segments.scene_description: The character turns right at the intersection, crossing the asphalt road as a blue van and red car pass by. The scene opens into a wider street view with buildings featuring red roofs and solar panels, while palm trees now line the left side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with storefronts and pedestrians

events.description: woman and child appear walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction

agents.ego_description: character follows a woman and child walking along the commercial sidewalk, passing by storefronts and vending machines

notable_agents.action: woman in white top walking with a small child in red shirt and blue cap

entered.detail: long single-story commercial building with large glass windows
row of yellow and red vending machines along the building facade
bright yellow shop entrance with signage

segments.scene_description: Walking along a commercial sidewalk, the character follows a woman and child past storefronts and colorful vending machines. The palm trees continue along the left while futuristic skyscrapers rise in the distant background.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial intersection with distinctive satellite dish building

events.description: character crosses the street at the intersection near the satellite dish building
passing the satellite dish building and entering the next block

agents.ego_description: character crosses the street near a building with a large satellite dish mural, then continues down the opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in gray outfit with face covering walking on the sidewalk

entered.detail: concrete building with large satellite dish featuring a face design on the roof
wall with large painted mural next to the satellite dish

segments.scene_description: Approaching a distinctive building with a large satellite dish and mural, the character crosses the street at the intersection. Other pedestrians walk along the sidewalks as the camera follows the character into the next block, with towering futuristic skyscrapers dominating the distant skyline.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit urban neighborhood that gradually transitions from a quiet residential area into a dense commercial district. It begins on a sidewalk bordered by a wooden house and palm trees, moving past a green dumpster and scattered cardboard boxes toward a distant city skyline. As the character turns right at an intersection, the camera crosses an asphalt road with passing vehicles and opens into a wider street view featuring red-roofed buildings and solar panels. The scene then shifts toward a commercial strip, following pedestrians past colorful vending machines and storefronts while the palm trees shift to the left side of the path. Finally, the camera crosses another intersection by a building with a large satellite dish and mural, moving into a new block where towering futuristic skyscrapers dominate the horizon.
